untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (HTF trend + LTF breakout structure) which cannot be expressed in single-timeframe indicator logic. Specific thresholds for LTF lookback bars and stop distance multiplier are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and are undefined. HTF and LTF timeframes not specified. Price structure/swing identification requires pattern recognition beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses sma_20 as proxy for pullback confirmation and volume confirmation. Entry requires breakout above recent resistance (prev_high/prev_low) with volume. Exit on reversal through MA. However, this loses the critical multi-timeframe momentum confirmation that is central to the strategy. Manual review and parameter optimization required.
